zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Cord於大約1656年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰巴爾的摩巴爾的摩時，她的父親William Cord21歲，母親Ann20歲。她於大約1677年與Roger Matthews在美國馬里蘭州巴爾的摩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1706年2月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname or metonymic occupational name from Middle English (Old French) corde ‘rope, cord, string’, possibly given to someone who wore a cord (round the waist) or who made ropes, bowstrings, etc. See Corder .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Mac Cuairt or Mac Cuarta, see McCord .

variants.name: Coard
meanings: In some cases possibly also French: variant of Couard, an unflattering nickname from Old French couard ‘coward, poltroon’, a compound of coe ‘tail’ + the pejorative suffix -ard.

variants.name: Cordell
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of cord or string or a nickname for an habitual wearer of decorative ties and ribbons, from Old French cordele, a diminutive of corde ‘cord’ (see Cord ).
Americanized form of German   Kardel   and   Kardell  .

variants.name: Cordes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eldor, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt, Deitrich, Dieter, Ewald, Franz, Fritz, Gerhard, Gunther, Heinrich.
English (Middlesex and Surrey): variant of Cord , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: variant of   Kordes   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Corder
meanings: English (Essex): occupational name from Middle English corder ‘rope maker’ (Old French cordier).

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries - 1660: Baltimore, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America, 1776: Baltimore, Maryland, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Cord was born about 1656, in Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British Colonial America, her father, William Cord, was 21 and her mother, Ann, was 20. She married Roger Matthews about 1677, in Baltimore, Maryland, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 6 February 1706, in Maryland, British Colonial America, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Cord est née environ 1656, à Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Cord, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ann, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Matthews environ 1677, à Baltimore, Maryland, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 février 1706, à Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Cord um 1656 in Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Cord 21 und ihre Mutter Ann 20. Sie hat um 1677 in Baltimore, Maryland, Vereinigte Staaten Roger Matthews geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Februar 1706 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Maryland, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Cord è nata il circa 1656 nel Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British Colonial America, sua padre, William Cord, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Ann, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Roger Matthews circa 1677, nel Baltimore, Maryland, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 febbraio 1706, nel Maryland, British Colonial America, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Cord(이)가 대략 1656년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 바팀어 바팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cord(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1677년 미국 메릴랜드 주 바팀어에서 Roger Matthews(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1706년 2월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Cord родилась около 1656 г. в местности балтимор, балтимор, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Cord было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ann, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Matthews около 1677 г. в местности балтимор, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 февраля 1706 г. в местности Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год.
